title: Yijing Hexagram 29: Kan (The Abysmal)
description: Hexagram 29 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 29 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: The Abysmal repeated. If you are sincere, you have success in your heart. Whatever you do succeeds.
